calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-15-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Petitioner, Kuo Chun Dai the guardian ad litem present in pro per and with the Mandarin Interpreter, Mr. Charles Zhang, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Kuo Chun Tai and the minor's name change to: Katherine Tai.
Decree signed in open court.
